data_consistency_check.notes: All required fields are present and internally consistent for a standard D&D 5e spell entry.

quality_assessment.description_review: The description clearly states the base effect and the scaling mechanic ('At Higher Levels'). The material component is simple and appropriate.

mechanics_analysis.scaling_mechanic: One additional creature target per spell slot level above 1st (e.g., 2nd level slot targets 2 creatures, 3rd level slot targets 3 creatures).
mechanics_analysis.class_balance_check: Appropriate for Bard, Druid, Ranger, and Wizard at level 1, fitting the theme of minor physical enhancement.

llm_audit.archivist_notes: Data integrity confirmed. Spell mechanics are standard and well-defined.
